source_truth.fr24_ingest: fr24/ package (FlightRadar24 screenshot inventory, ensemble OCR, RLSM/route extraction, manual-review queue, event export); CLI entry scripts/fr24_vision_ingest.py. Stdlib-only core.
source_truth.primary_inputs: FlightRadar24 screenshots/tracks (ingested in-tree via fr24/), aircraft registry, GEBCO bathymetry (optional)
source_truth.provenance: Airspace engine extracted from spiderweb-pr branch claude/pr-airspace-intelligence-v7Mbh; FR24 ingest/OCR pipeline migrated from spiderweb-pr into fr24/ (38 modules); export contract salvaged from Puerto-Rico-Airspace-Intelligence-Tool PR #1.
source_truth.airport_registry: data/reference/pr_airports.jsonl (19 real PR airports, FAA NASR + Airport_Master_PR_seed)

blocking_conditions: no live observation export yet — only the synthetic_airspace_package example is present
canonical export adapter (scripts/federation_export.py) projects observations->entities/sources/relationships; production blocked until non-synthetic observations load
GEBCO terrain layer + RAG/earthgpt + satellite ingest + mission/operational intelligence remain in the spiderweb archive branch and are not yet ported
FR24 ingest pipeline is now in-tree (fr24/); ILAP intake still requires FlightRadar24 screenshot/track inputs supplied locally (external data gap)
